selected_tasks.body_preview: - Current assessment matched this harness seed: Recent evo evidence showed implementation attempts ending with no file progress and no terminal evidence. The next seed must target landable task-selection logic so DeepSeek can improve the loop without touching protected evolution files. Edit Surface: - scripts/preseed_session_plan.py, scripts/state_graph_tool
selected_tasks.expected_evidence: Future task manifests show landable Files entries for task-success repair pressure. Future trajectory pressure leads with implementation failure repair when `task_analysis_only_attempt_count` is above 0 and task_success_rate is 0.0. Implementation Notes: This task was seeded by the harness before planner exploration because recent runs reached planning witho
selected_tasks.title: Make analysis-only task pressure landable
